response.justification: Despite a strong full-stack and open-source background, the candidate has minimal C++ experience — only a brief role at National Instruments involving LabWindows/CVI, with no evidence of modern C++/STL, multi-threading, message brokers, or industrial cybersecurity standards like IEC 62443, which are core to the role. His recent work is dominated by TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with no demonstrable cloud-native or IoT automation platform experience.
strengths: Extensive full-stack and open-source contributions with strong documentation and teaching skills
Proven experience in distributed systems, event-driven architectures, and DevOps tooling
Demonstrated ability to lead technical initiatives and mentor teams through workshops and open-source projects
concerns: Lacks recent or substantial C++/STL development experience critical for the role
No evidence of exposure to industrial automation protocols (Modbus, OPC UA, IEC 61850) or IEC 62443 security standards
Primary tech stack is JavaScript/TypeScript and DLang, with no demonstrated cloud platform (Azure) or IoT application development
